text: My rice field has hopperburn with yellowing and drying at the base of the tillers, and I've been applying extra nitrogen. What pest is this?
There are spindle shaped grey lesions with brown margins on my rice leaves, and now even the panicle neck looks infected. What disease is it?
My rice leaves have water soaked yellow lesions running along the margins after heavy rain, what is this disease?
My wheat leaves have yellow-orange powdery pustules arranged in stripes, what is this?
There are small green insects clustering on my wheat ear heads and leaves excreting a sticky substance, what pest is this?
Patches of my crop are wilting and dying even though there has been no drought, and I found white ant-like insects at the roots.
Tiny white insects fly up from the underside of my cotton leaves when I disturb the plant, and there's a black sooty coating on the leaves.
My cotton leaves are curling downward at the margins and turning yellow-bronze, what is causing this?
My tomato leaves have water soaked patches turning brown with a pale halo and white growth underneath in this humid weather, what is happening?
There are round holes in my tomato fruit with some frass near the entry point, what pest is this?
My potato leaves are rotting with dark lesions and a white ring on the underside, and I'm worried about the tubers, what should I do?
What is the general strategy for reducing pesticide use while still controlling pests effectively?
My rice plants are stunted with yellow-orange leaves and low tillering, and I've seen green leafhoppers around, what disease could this be?
Some of my wheat grains have a black powdery mass with a foul fishy smell but the grain isn't fully destroyed, what is this?
I opened a cotton boll and found the petals webbed together with larval silk in a rosette shape, and pin-sized holes in the boll.
My cotton leaves are curling upward with thickened veins and small leaf-like growths on the underside, what is this?
My young tomato seedlings have severely curled, crinkled small leaves and are badly stunted, what is causing this?
My ripening chili fruit have sunken circular water soaked spots with dark rings inside them, what disease is this?
When I split open my sugarcane stalk, the inside is reddish with white cross bands and smells alcoholic, what is wrong?
My young sugarcane shoots are dying from the center with a foul smell and come out easily when pulled, what pest is this?
My stored potato tubers have tunnels with frass inside them, what pest caused this?
There's window-pane style feeding damage and sawdust-like waste inside the whorl of my young maize plants, what pest is this?
Which systemic fungicide is commonly used for seed treatment and against anthracnose and leaf spot diseases?
I have a highly persistent beetle infestation in my stored wheat that survives for a long time even without food, what is this pest?
Mere kapas ke patton par tela lag gaya hai aur pattiyan neeche ki taraf mud rahi hain.
Bhindi ke patton par hara tela dikh raha hai, kya spray karu?
Kapas ke patton ke niche safed makkhi bahut zyada hai aur kaali fungus bhi lag gayi hai.
Amar tulo gach e sada makhi hoyeche, ki korbo?
Dhaan ke paudhon ke jad me bhura fudka lag gaya hai aur patte sukh rahe hain.
Dhaan ki fasal me tana chhedak lag gaya hai, beech ka ankur sookh gaya hai.
Mere khet me deemak lag gayi hai aur paudhe murjha rahe hain bina barish ki kami ke.
Gehun ki fasal ki jadon me dimak dikh rahi hai.
Gehun ki baliyon par chepa lag gaya hai aur chipchipa padarth nikal raha hai.
Sarson ke patton par chepa kida bahut ho gaya hai.
Gehun ke patton par geru rog lag gaya hai, peeli dhaari dikh rahi hai.
Bhindi ke patton par safed dhool rog lag gaya hai.
Tamatar ke paudhon par jhulsa rog lag gaya hai, patte jhulas rahe hain is nami wale mausam mein.
Kapas ke phool aur tinde me gulabi sundi lag gayi hai, phool jaal jaisa dikh raha hai.
Tamatar ke phal me phal chhedak lag gaya hai, gol chhed dikh raha hai.
Mirch ke phalon par kala dhabba rog lag gaya hai, gol dhabbe ban rahe hain.
Mirchi ke phal me kariya dhabba dikh raha hai paakte samay.
Ganne ke tane ko chir kar dekha to andar lal sadan jaisa dikh raha hai aur sharaab jaisi gandh aa rahi hai.
Gudam me rakhe gehun me dana ghun lag gaya hai aur bahut samay se hata nahi paa rahe.
Bhandarit anaj me ghun lag gaya hai.
Amar tomato gach er pata mora hoyeche, khub chotoi hoye geche.
Tamatar ke chote paudhon ki pattiyan mud gayi hain aur paudhe bahut chote reh gaye hain.
Makke ke paudhon ki gobhi me fauji keeda lag gaya hai, andar bhoosa jaisa mal dikh raha hai.
Gehun ke kuch dane kaale aur bhurbhure ho gaye hain ajeeb badbu ke saath.
Dhaan ke paudhe baune reh gaye hain aur patte peele-santre range ke ho gaye hain, hariyal tiddey bhi dikhe.
Makke ke paudhon ki gobhi mein tambaku sundi ka prakop hai, chura jaisa mal dikh raha hai.
